title: 🔷 Modular Forms & Moonshine
name: Modular Forms & Moonshine
what_it_is: Highly structured mathematical forms connected to symmetry and string theory—"monstrous moonshine" refers to mysterious links between these and group theory monsters.
how_to_use: her dress is stitched from modular form fields—symmetry woven in moonshine logic
the shrine pulses with monstrous moonshine—sacred math radiates from hidden order
animation_behavior: Patterns resonate harmonically, math-symbols bloom and contract, unseen logic pulses visibly
